summary: Full stack testing of ARENAKORE Sprint 12. Tested: admin login, 5-tab navigation, KORE Passport + ArenaGO Radar + KORE CARD, Apple Wallet modal, Google Wallet modal, NEXUS Command Center, full NEXUS scan flow (bioscan → forge → countdown → SmoothedValidation → KORE IDENTIFICATO). All 17 backend wallet tests passed. All frontend flows verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: Returns 400 when validation scan is pending (by design: 48h rule). Error is silenced on frontend and user proceeds to forge. This is expected behavior but the 400 error appears in console as a resource load failure.

react_native_issues.issue: Pre-existing console warnings: 'shadow* style props deprecated', 'TouchableMixin deprecated', 'onStartShouldSetResponder unknown event handler'. Non-breaking, no UX impact.

critical_code_review_comments: Wallet endpoints are MOCKED: Apple Wallet .pkpass has mock PKCS7 signature (MOCK_SIGNATURE_PLACEHOLDER_REPLACE_WITH_PKCS7_SIGNED_CERT). Google Wallet JWT is signed with local SECRET_KEY not Google Service Account key. Correctly labeled as mock in modal note.
Bioscan 400 error silenced in frontend — expected behavior when user already has pending validation scan.
SmoothedValidation (PUPPET-MOTION-DECK): 10-sample moving average correctly implemented. Progress pauses (not resets) when stability < 82%. 'IN PAUSA — NON RESETTATO' text confirms correct behavior.
Apple Wallet button uses Platform.OS !== 'android' guard — correctly hides on Android, shows on web/iOS. Testing was done on web where button is visible.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 12 fully tested and passing. Login: admin@arenadare.com / Admin2026!. Landing screen has RESUME button → login form. All 5 tabs working. KORE tab: scroll down with mouse wheel (10 clicks) to reach wallet buttons. Apple/Google Wallet modals: Nike Elite style, cyan title, CHIUDI button closes. NEXUS flow: click NEXUS gold tab → click at (100, 350) for NEXUS SCAN card → wait 5s bioscan → click PERSONAL TRAINING → click DEEP SQUAT → wait 4.5s → SmoothedValidation active → wait 5s → KORE IDENTIFICATO gold screen. Bioscan returns 400 for admin (validation pending 45h) — silenced and expected. MOCKED: Apple .pkpass signature, Google Wallet JWT signing.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. The bioscan 400 error is by-design (48h cooldown rule). SmoothedValidation works correctly: stability builds up via 10-sample moving average, progress pauses but doesn't reset on low stability periods.
